content: MANBEARPIG v9.0: Primary inference engine. 142 JSON-RPC methods, 55 skills, 140 modules. ML: TF-IDF (50K features, trigram) + NaiveBayes + BM25 + semantic embeddings. Training: 200K docs, 2-5min. Self-evolving (8 methods). Zero network. CLI: python 00_SYSTEM/local_model/inference_engine.py 'query'. Pipe: --pipe for JSON-RPC.
